criteria: Graduate/PhD reading level words with Latin/Greek derivation, technical, archaic, or literary terms. Focus on psychological, medical, and social commentary vocabulary matching Wong's raw, confessional, sharp style.

words.context: Hormone pills as suppositories, Push Pop them up myself every single night
words.definition: A steroid hormone involved in the menstrual cycle and maintaining pregnancy

words.context: You pee on these ovulation strips that tell you when the eggs are droppin'
words.definition: The release of an egg from the ovary during the menstrual cycle

words.context: Last year, I had a miscarriage, which is very common
words.definition: Spontaneous loss of pregnancy before the 20th week

words.context: That's why I'm going to hire a doula. You know what a doula is? That's a white hippie witch
words.definition: A trained professional who provides continuous physical, emotional, and informational support during childbirth

words.context: I am already so resentful towards my husband. So much resentment
words.definition: Bitter indignation at having been treated unfairly; deep-seated anger

words.context: I'm jealous, first and foremost, of their metabolism
words.definition: The chemical processes in a living organism necessary for the maintenance of life

words.context: You have to call a lactation consultant. A lactation consultant is a white NPR listener with dreadlocks, Named Indigo
words.definition: The secretion of milk by the mammary glands and the period of breastfeeding

words.context: Catheter, I had never had a catheter in my life. A catheter is a tube that they hook up to your pee-pee hole
words.definition: A thin tube inserted into the body to administer or drain fluids

words.context: They put the anesthesia in your back, and then they put up this curtain
words.definition: Medication used to induce loss of sensation or consciousness during medical procedures

words.context: You think I wanna fuck an 18-year-old boy when I'm on the precipice of menopause?
words.definition: The time marking the end of menstrual cycles, diagnosed after 12 months without a period

words.context: When I'm on the precipice of menopause
words.definition: A very steep rock face; a hazardous situation or one that could lead to disaster

words.context: He is bespoke to me. Irreplaceable!
words.definition: Custom-made; specifically created for a particular person or purpose

words.context: Lately, I have been ruminating a lot over this one time I hooked up with this dude
words.definition: Deep or considered thought; in psychology, repetitive focus on distressing thoughts

words.context: Especially when that fear metamorphosizes into pleasure
words.definition: Undergoes a complete change of form, structure, or substance; transformation

words.context: I know exactly why there's a disproportionate amount of men that do stand-up
words.definition: Too large or too small in comparison with something else; lacking proper balance

words.context: Any man watching me, listening to what I have to say, and thinking to themselves, 'I want to fuck her…' is a raging psychopath
words.definition: A person with a chronic mental disorder with abnormal or violent social behavior

words.context: I had a colonoscopy a couple years ago. That is some 50-year-old man shit right there
words.definition: An examination of the colon using a flexible tube with a camera

words.context: Now I'm in monogamy jail, and I don't know how to get out
words.definition: The practice of being married to or having a sexual relationship with only one person at a time

words.context: It was sparkly and glistening. Viscous but not too pasty
words.definition: Having a thick, sticky consistency between solid and liquid; having high viscosity

words.context: Divorce gets a really bad reputation and it can sound really scary and full of acrimony
words.definition: Bitterness or ill feeling, especially in speech or behavior; harshness

words.context: So that was sort of the impetus for me to get back up on stage and do stand-up again
words.definition: The force or energy with which a body moves; a driving force or stimulus

words.context: Who's gonna want this geriatric uterus, these breastfed National Geographic titties?
words.definition: Relating to old age or the medical care of elderly people

words.context: I still suffer from scarcity mindset. I am still so devastatingly cheap
words.definition: A cognitive pattern where one believes resources are limited, leading to hoarding or fear-based financial decisions

notes: Ali Wong's vocabulary reflects her unique comedic voice: medically explicit (lactation, catheter, colonoscopy), psychologically astute (resentment, ruminating, psychopath), and socially incisive (monogamy, disproportionate, scarcity mindset). Her word choices blend clinical precision with raw confessional honesty, often using technical terms to demystify taboo subjects like childbirth, sexuality, and divorce.
